title: Distributed Context Propagation
description: Injecting and extracting trace context across service boundaries (HTTP headers, AMQP, Kafka)

use_cases.name: Inject Trace Context into HTTP Headers
use_cases.description: Serialize SpanContext into carrier map with x-datadog-trace-id, x-datadog-parent-id, x-datadog-sampling-priority, x-datadog-origin, ot-baggage-* headers

use_cases.name: Extract Trace Context from HTTP Headers
use_cases.description: Deserialize incoming HTTP headers into a SpanContext to continue an existing trace
steps: Validates traceId and spanId are numeric strings

use_cases.name: Create Child Span from Propagated Context
use_cases.description: Use extracted SpanContext to start a new span that continues the distributed trace
steps: start_span() to push onto native span stack
New SpanContext inherits traceId, copies baggage, links parentContext

use_cases.name: Inject Context into AMQP Message
use_cases.description: Embed trace headers in AMQP application_headers before publishing

use_cases.name: Extract Context from AMQP Message
use_cases.description: Read trace headers from incoming AMQP message and link to new consumer trace
steps: Create span links between producer and consumer traces

use_cases.name: Inject Context into Kafka Message
use_cases.description: Inject distributed tracing headers into Kafka ProducerTopic::producev() args
steps: hook.overrideArguments(args) to pass headers into Kafka message

use_cases.name: Get Current OTel Context
use_cases.description: Retrieve active context bridged between DDTrace native spans and OpenTelemetry context API
steps: Context::deactivateEndedParents(ddSpan) recursively ends completed OTel spans

use_cases.name: Propagate Baggage Items
use_cases.description: Carry key-value baggage across service boundaries via SpanContext
steps: SpanContext::withBaggageItem(key, value) returns new immutable SpanContext
TextMap::inject() serializes baggage as ot-baggage-{key} headers
TextMap::extract() deserializes ot-baggage-* headers back to baggageItems
Context::get(baggageContextKey) builds Baggage from DDTrace span.baggage
Context::with(baggageContextKey, baggage) stores baggage items on DDTrace span

use_cases.name: Determine Operation Name by Convention
use_cases.description: Derive standardized OTel operation names from span metadata (span.kind + semantic attributes)
steps: Read span.meta for span.kind, http.request.method, db.system, messaging.system, rpc.system, faas.trigger, graphql.operation.type

use_cases.name: Normalize Trace Analytics Sampling Rate
use_cases.description: Set or unset the _dd1.sr.eausr analytics metric on a span's metrics map

key_components.name: TextMap
key_components.notes: Concrete HTTP/text-map propagator; handles both TEXT_MAP and HTTP_HEADERS formats

key_components.name: SpanContext
key_components.notes: Immutable; createAsChild calls set_distributed_tracing_context() + start_span() to bridge native engine

key_components.name: Context
key_components.notes: Bridges DDTrace native spans to OTel context; uses ObjectKVStore for DDSpan<->OTelSpan association

key_components.name: Convention
key_components.notes: OTel operation name derivation from span kind + semantic convention attributes

key_components.name: TraceAnalyticsProcessor
key_components.notes: Sets _dd1.sr.eausr metric; bool true=1.0, false=unset, float 0-1 stored as-is

key_components.name: Tracer
key_components.notes: Holds $propagators map keyed by Format; routes inject/extract calls to TextMap by default for TEXT_MAP and HTTP_HEADERS

key_components.name: Format
key_components.notes: Format identifiers used as keys in Tracer::$propagators

key_relationships: Tracer depends_on Propagator[] (injected by format key)
AMQPIntegration uses Propagator constants for header names
important_notes: isDistributedTracingActivationContext=true flags incoming remote context (vs local child spans)
SpanContext is immutable; withBaggageItem() returns a new instance
Tracer defaults to TextMap for both TEXT_MAP and HTTP_HEADERS formats
Context (OTel) uses ObjectKVStore to link DDTrace SpanData to OTel SDK Span
generate_distributed_tracing_headers() is a native DDTrace PHP extension function
Convention::defaultOperationName() returns empty string as fallback to avoid using resource name
TraceAnalyticsProcessor sets _dd1.sr.eausr (Tag::ANALYTICS_KEY) metric for App Analytics
AMQPIntegration creates span links between producer and consumer traces (not parent-child)
